name: Diet Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the ingredients together in a large bowl until well combined.
2. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it on a greased baking sheet.
3. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 30 minutes, or until the bread is cooked through.
4. Allow the bread to cool before slicing and serving.
This bread is very low in calories. An entire 1 1/2 pound loaf has less than 1500 calories.
